summary: Transaction Search & Numbering System (Iteration 94) - All features working correctly. Backend APIs pass 14/15 tests (health endpoint 404 is not critical). Frontend UI fully functional with Quick Search, Find Transaction page, and ReferenceNumberPrompt.

issues: Console warnings about duplicate React keys (retail/wholesale/special) - not affecting functionality

backend_api.GET /api/search/transactions (empty quer: PASSED - Returns empty results with total=0
backend_api.Invoice numbering format: PASSED - Both old (SI-YYYYMMDD-XXXX) and new (SI-XX-XXXXXX) formats exist
backend_api.Search result structure: PASSED - All required fields present (type, id, number, title, amount, balance, status, date, branch_id, sub_type, created_at)

frontend_ui.Quick Search dropdown: PASSED - Input appears, results dropdown shows, advanced link present
frontend_ui.Find Transaction empty state: PASSED - Shows helpful hints (SI-MN-001042, Walk-in, PO-, GCash)
frontend_ui.Filters panel: PASSED - Type filter, date from/to, branch filter all present
frontend_ui.Search results list: PASSED - Shows results with type badges and amounts
frontend_ui.Results summary: PASSED - Shows count and type breakdown (e.g., 'Invoice / Sale: 20, Expense: 6')
frontend_ui.ReferenceNumberPrompt component: PASSED - Integrated in UnifiedSalesPage and PurchaseOrderPage

critical_code_review_comments: New atomic numbering system correctly uses MongoDB $inc for race-safe counter
Branch codes are auto-generated from branch names (first letters)
Old transaction numbers (SI-YYYYMMDD-XXXX format) remain intact in database
New transactions will use new format (SI-XX-XXXXXX)
idempotency_key added to invoices, sales, and PO creation endpoints
Minor: React key warnings in sales page for price scheme options (retail/wholesale/special) - functional but should use unique keys

success_rate.backend: 93% (14/15 tests passed - health endpoint not critical)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing invoices, POs, expenses
context_for_next_testing_agent: Transaction search system fully tested. Quick Search in header works with keyboard shortcut (Ctrl+K). Find Transaction page at /find-transaction supports text search, type filtering (invoice/po/expense/internal_invoice/fund_transfer), date range filtering, and branch filtering. New atomic numbering format is SI-XX-XXXXXX where XX is branch code. ReferenceNumberPrompt component shows after creating sales/POs. Branch codes auto-generate from branch names.

verified_test_ids.quick-search-input: Search input when quick search is open
verified_test_ids.quick-search-advanced-link: Link to full Find Transaction page
verified_test_ids.search-input: Main search input on Find Transaction page
verified_test_ids.search-filters-panel: Filters panel containing type, date, branch filters
verified_test_ids.reference-number-prompt: Reference number modal after transaction creation
verified_test_ids.reference-copy-btn: Copy button in reference number modal
verified_test_ids.reference-done-btn: Done button in reference number modal
